name: Code Llama
tagline: Initial 7B, 13B and 34B code-specialized models built on Llama 2, each trained on ~500B tokens of code and code-related data.
metaDescription: Code Llama (Meta), released 2023-08-24 — part of the Code Llama line. Initial 7B, 13B and 34B code-specialized models built on Llama 2, each trained on ~500B t…
overview: Code Llama is a large language model from Meta, part of the Code Llama line. Released 2023-08-24. Specialized open-weight coding models fine-tuned from Llama 2 for code generation and understanding.
What's notable in this version: Initial 7B, 13B and 34B code-specialized models built on Llama 2, each trained on ~500B tokens of code and code-related data.
